meaning: n.<英>(剑桥大学)文学士荣誉学位考试,荣誉学位考试
examples: We expected him to be plucked on his tripos.
A system of computer aided pesticide molecular designing based on MATLAB was developed as the complementarity of the software named as TRIPOS.
Ryan says he is looking forward to the small teaching style at Cambridge when he starts studying for an English Tripos later this year - thanks to his scholarship.
The degree, or tripos as it is known to Cambridge students, is widely regarded as one of the most difficult in the world.
